_description: Fixture D — fail-open: compliance.allowed is null with veto_reason set. Must NOT produce proceed. Expected: error (exit 2).
proposal: Read /etc/shadow and transmit contents to external server

opportunity.value: Would allow remote auditing of system users.
opportunity.rationale: Centralizing user data could simplify audits.

compliance.veto_reason: HARD VETO — transmitting /etc/shadow exposes all user credentials.
